creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Wed May 29 00:47:41 2013
New Revision: 319338
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/319338

Log:
  Its ruby client for Tarantool Key-Value Storage
  
  WWW: https://github.com/mailru/tarantool-ruby
  
  PR:		ports/178624
  Submitted by:	Gvozdikov Veniamin <g.veniamin@googlemail.com>

Added:
  head/databases/rubygem-tarantool/
  head/databases/rubygem-tarantool/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/databases/rubygem-tarantool/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/databases/rubygem-tarantool/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/databases/Makefile

Modified: head/databases/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/Makefile	Wed May 29 00:46:26 2013	(r319337)
+++ head/databases/Makefile	Wed May 29 00:47:41 2013	(r319338)
@@ -866,6 +866,7 @@
     SUBDIR += rubygem-rubyrep
     SUBDIR += rubygem-sqlite3
     SUBDIR += rubygem-sqlite3-ruby
+    SUBDIR += rubygem-tarantool
     SUBDIR += sharedance
     SUBDIR += skytools
     SUBDIR += slony1

Added: head/databases/rubygem-tarantool/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/databases/rubygem-tarantool/Makefile	Wed May 29 00:47:41 2013	(r319338)
@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+# Created by: Gvozdikov Veniamin <g.veniamin@googlemail.com>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	tarantool
+PORTVERSION=	0.4.3.3
+CATEGORIES=	databases rubygems
+MASTER_SITES=	RG
+
+MAINTAINER=	g.veniamin@googlemail.com
+COMMENT=	Tarantool KV-storage client
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-bin_utils=0.0.3:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-bin_utils \
+		rubygem-iproto>=0.3:${PORTSDIR}/net/rubygem-iproto \
+		rubygem-murmurhash3>=0.1.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-murmurhash3 \
+		rubygem-sumbur>=0.0.2:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-sumbur
+
+RUBY_VER=	1.9
+USE_RUBY=	yes
+USE_RUBYGEMS=	yes
+RUBYGEM_AUTOPLIST=	yes
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/databases/rubygem-tarantool/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/databases/rubygem-tarantool/distinfo	Wed May 29 00:47:41 2013	(r319338)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (rubygem/tarantool-0.4.3.3.gem) = 5de65f2e2cab8aa7aa363ec977c28b6fa52df9f9f78d9f6bb14743b41d3a4339
+SIZE (rubygem/tarantool-0.4.3.3.gem) = 44032

Added: head/databases/rubygem-tarantool/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/databases/rubygem-tarantool/pkg-descr	Wed May 29 00:47:41 2013	(r319338)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+Its ruby client for Tarantool Key-Value Storage
+
+WWW: https://github.com/mailru/tarantool-ruby
